ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state where the data was recorded */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region where the data was recorded */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million people */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of deaths per million people */,
  "recovered_per_million" REAL /* Number of recovered cases per million people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_province_state FOREIGN KEY ("province_state") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_region FOREIGN KEY ("country_region") REFERENCES countries_regions ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces_states" (
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state */,
  "province_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region the province or state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province or state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the province or state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country or region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country or region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overall data entry */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was recorded */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on that date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on that date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on that date */,
  "cases_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on that date */,
  "deaths_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths on that date */,
  "recovered_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of new recovered cases on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was recorded */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinated individuals */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "first_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "booster_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "beds_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available */,
  "icu_beds_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds available */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of patients occupying beds */,
  "ventilators_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators available */,
  "current_ventilator_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of ventilators in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel restriction */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state */,
  "restriction_date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction was implemented */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of travel restriction (e.g., lockdown, border closure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restriction */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction is set to expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_restrictions_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic impact data entry */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state */,
  "economic_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was recorded */,
  "gdp_change" REAL /* Change in GDP percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_impact_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "data_section" TEXT /* Section of data accessed (e.g., case data, vaccination data) */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Query string used to retrieve the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., pandemic forecast, economic impact analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was integrated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the social media post was published */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was published */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who published the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)
